def positive_json_roundtrip_used_for_object_copy():
    rule_id = "json_roundtrip_used_for_object_copy"
    family = "hot_path"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag code that serializes and deserializes objects only to make a copy."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
